docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY CORONADO, MARCO JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON-HUNNICUTT, AJALIA LASHAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-06-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON-HUNNICUTT, AJALIA LASHAY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2026 - CONTINUED TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-23-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARO JOSHUA CORONADO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AJALIA LASHAY JACKSON-HONNICUTT IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS LAJEANNE HAINES. PROOF OF SERVICE IS UNTIMELY FILED AND IS 4 DAYS SHORT. THE DEFENDANT EVOKES HER RIGHT TO CURE THE UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2026 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARCO JOSHUA CORONADO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AJALIA LASHAY JACKSON-HUNNICUTT IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORONADO, MARCO JOSHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON-HUNNICUTT, AJALIA LASHAY $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,650.00, THE COURT FINDS THE PROPER MEASURE OF DAMAGES TO BE THE VALUE OF THE CAR PRIOR TO THE ACCIDENT AS COMPARED TO THE SALE PRICE, WHICH EXCEEDS THE JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT. DAMAGES ARE THEREFORE CAPPED AT $12,500. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CORONADO, MARCO JOSHUA JACKSON-HUNNICUTT, AJALIA LASHAY
SC-220 REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT JACKSON-HUNNICUTT, AJALIA LASHAY
SC-221 RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CORONADO, MARCO JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON-HUNNICUTT, AJALIA LASHAY

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS APPROVED, AND THE COURT ORDERS PAYMENTS OF $160.00 ON THE 25TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING JULY 25, 2026 UNTIL MARCH 25, 2033 AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $10.00. **ENDORSED COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES**
